approach: Replace per-provider permission settings with a single speckit.permissionMode setting, add getPermissionFlag() to IAIProvider interface, remove PermissionManager infrastructure
last_action: T008 complete — documented permissionMode setting in README

T001.did: Added speckit.permissionMode setting with default/bypass enum, removed 3 old per-provider settings

T002.did: Added getPermissionFlag() to IAIProvider interface and readPermissionMode() shared helper

T003.did: Rewrote Claude getPermissionFlag to use readPermissionMode, removed ensurePermissions/static variant/PermissionManager import

T004.did: Rewrote Copilot getPermissionFlag to use readPermissionMode

T005.did: Replaced getYoloMode() with getPermissionFlag() using readPermissionMode, updated all call sites

T006.did: Added no-op getPermissionFlag() to Gemini and Codex providers

T007.did: Removed PermissionManager/PermissionWebview entirely, cleaned extension.ts of all permission infrastructure

T008.did: Added Permission Mode section to README documenting the unified setting

decisions: Made getPermissionFlag() public on all providers to satisfy IAIProvider interface (was private before)
Used readPermissionMode() in createPermissionTerminal static method directly since static helper was removed

specify.key_finding: Three providers already have their own permission/yolo flags with inconsistent setting names — unification into one setting with per-provider translation is straightforward

plan.approach_summary: Replace per-provider permission settings with a single speckit.permissionMode setting, add getPermissionFlag() to IAIProvider interface, remove PermissionManager infrastructure
risks: Existing bypass users silently lose bypass on upgrade since new default is 'default'
